Event: The Spartan Adventure
Event Date: 23/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: CB52
Thunderblast Crossbow

When attacking, has a 36% chance of dealing 185% damage in 2 seconds.
Once in a while, the unit launches bolts at all enemy units. Upon impact, targets receive 500000 pure damage, and one of the following effects is triggered:

- If the target has over 50% health remaining after hit, the target is petrified for 4 sec. It becomes unable to move, and takes 35% more damage. The target also explodes every second for the duration. It and all enemy units in a large radius around receive physical damage equal to 75% of the crossbow wielder's attack.

- If the target has less than 50% health remaining after hit, 3 random positive effects are removed from it, and it becomes unable to receive new positive effects for 4 sec. Silence is cast upon it for 4 sec. as well.
For that duration, the target is unable to use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set).

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
